scripts.install:user: npm run build && node scripts/install-claude.mjs --target user
scripts.install:project: npm run build && node scripts/install-claude.mjs --target project
scripts.update:user:local: npm run build && node scripts/update-claude.mjs --target user --from-local-build
scripts.update:project:local: npm run build && node scripts/update-claude.mjs --target project --from-local-build
